creator: mi@misha.cisco.com
text:
I was downloading a huge file and did not have enough room, as
	it turned out. The ftp-client said exactly the following:
	/home: write failed, file system is full

ftp: local: 6.1-i386.iso: No space left on device
 10% |*********                                         | 67871 KB    14:47 ETA
426 Data connection: Success.
69500896 bytes received in 102.02 seconds (665.31 KB/s)
ftp> 

	It only got 10%, but the rate reported was computed as if it
	received it all.

How-To-Repeat: 
	See above...
